name: Airtable
one_liner: Cloud spreadsheet-database hybrid for building relational apps, with a REST Web API to read/write records, manage schema, and subscribe to change webhooks.
access_notes: Any Airtable account (including the free plan) can create a personal access token at airtable.com/create/tokens with scoped permissions, giving working API credentials instantly with no payment or human approval. OAuth is available for third-party integrations acting on behalf of other users. Legacy API keys were deprecated Feb 1, 2024.
api_notes: Web API follows REST semantics with JSON. Covers record CRUD (list/create/update/delete, batching up to 10 records), metadata operations (list bases, list/create/update tables and fields, read base schema), and a full webhooks management API. No GraphQL. Roughly a few dozen distinct operations across records, schema, and webhooks.
mcp_notes: Airtable ships an official vendor MCP server at https://mcp.airtable.com/mcp, connected over OAuth. Documented in Airtable Support ('Using the Airtable MCP server'), it exposes ~12 tools (list/search bases, list/create/update tables, list/create/update records, read schema, create/update fields, ping). Works with Claude, ChatGPT, and any MCP client. Community servers (e.g. domdomegg/airtable-mcp-server) also exist.
main_blocker: None significant. Free self-serve personal access tokens plus a documented REST API and webhooks make it straightforward to build agent tools.

evidence.claim: Web API follows REST semantics, uses JSON, and supports personal access tokens and OAuth (API keys deprecated Feb 1, 2024).
Airtable provides a Webhooks API to receive real-time notifications of base changes via POST to /v0/bases/{baseId}/webhooks.
Airtable offers an official OAuth-based MCP server at https://mcp.airtable.com/mcp exposing ~12 tools.
The API closely follows REST semantics, uses JSON to encode objects, and relies on standard HTTP codes.

open_questions: Exact API rate limits per plan (commonly cited as 5 requests/sec/base) and whether metadata/webhook features are gated on higher paid tiers were not fully confirmed in this pass.
